readings.Aries: The force you bring to a problem reshapes the problem. Make sure you're reshaping it usefully. The question matters more than the answer right now.
readings.Taurus: Your patience is remarkable. Your patience is also a place you sometimes hide. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Gemini: You are in the middle of two things you haven't admitted are contradictory. They are. Saying less will move this further than saying more.
readings.Cancer: The mood has been difficult and you've been managing it alone. That arrangement can change. One conversation today matters more than the rest combined.
readings.Leo: There is a project that deserves your full flame. Stop parcelling it out in careful doses. There's more support available than you've asked for.
readings.Virgo: You notice what others miss. This is a gift. It is also an exhausting way to move through the world. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Libra: Someone is ready to hear your honest assessment. They've been waiting for you to trust them with it. Go back to the original intention — it's still the right one.
readings.Scorpio: The loyalty you give is total. The loyalty you require is reasonable. Don't lower the bar. Trust the slow version of this over the fast one.
readings.Sagittarius: You've outgrown something. The exit is available. Give it a moment of ceremony. The window for this is shorter than it looks.
readings.Capricorn: The authority you carry was earned. Use it with care today. The energy available today is better used gently.
readings.Aquarius: The independence you protect is real and necessary. Today it is being used defensively rather than freely. Someone you haven't thought of lately is relevant to this.
readings.Pisces: You have given people the version of yourself they could handle. Show someone the rest. Small, deliberate, and patient — that's the mode today.

Aries-Aries.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Taurus.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Aries-Gemini.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Cancer.synthesis: You want incompatible things from closeness. That tension is generative until it isn't.

Aries-Leo.synthesis: The warmth is real. So is the risk that you start competing over it rather than sharing it.

Aries-Virgo.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Aries-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Scorpio.synthesis: The heat and the depth exist in real tension. That tension is the most honest thing between you.

Aries-Sagittarius.synthesis: You both arrived wanting to lead. The negotiation of who does is where most of the energy goes.

Aries-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Aries-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Aries-Pisces.synthesis: You are changed by proximity to each other. This is not neutral, and it was never going to be.

Taurus-Taurus.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Gemini.synthesis: Your different relationships with time are either the most useful thing about this or the most exhausting.

Taurus-Cancer.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Taurus-Leo.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Virgo.synthesis: You recognise each other's methods. Whether that familiarity breeds trust or contempt is up to you.

Taurus-Libra.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Taurus-Scorpio.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Taurus-Sagittarius.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Taurus-Capricorn.synthesis: The practical language between you is fluent and efficient. The emotional one takes more effort from both.

Taurus-Aquarius.synthesis: The friction between you is productive until the day one of you decides it isn't worth it. Don't let it go that long.

Taurus-Pisces.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Gemini-Gemini.synthesis: Together you can analyse anything. The one thing neither of you wants to analyse is this.

Gemini-Cancer.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Gemini-Leo.synthesis: The energy is contagious. People feel it from the outside. Make sure you both still feel it from the inside.

Gemini-Virgo.synthesis: You need each other more than you'll admit, and you both demonstrate this through argument.

Gemini-Libra.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Scorpio.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Gemini-Sagittarius.synthesis: You're both good at starting things. One of you will have to become better at finishing them.

Gemini-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Gemini-Aquarius.synthesis: The conversation never stops. Decide if what you're talking around is more interesting than what you'd find if you arrived.

Gemini-Pisces.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Cancer-Cancer.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Leo.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Cancer-Virgo.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Cancer-Libra.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Scorpio.synthesis: You see each other clearly enough to hurt each other precisely. That's not a warning. It's just the truth.

Cancer-Sagittarius.synthesis: You affect each other immediately and completely. That's not always comfortable and not always harmful.

Cancer-Capricorn.synthesis: You offer each other what you each struggle most to give yourself: one of you offers ground, one of you offers feeling.

Cancer-Aquarius.synthesis: The connection is real and confusing to both of you. You're not sure how it works. It works anyway.

Cancer-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

Leo-Leo.synthesis: You give each other permission to be more yourselves. Sometimes that permission is exactly the problem.

Leo-Virgo.synthesis: The slow materials and the fast energy can build something neither could alone. Patience is required from the fire.

Leo-Libra.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Scorpio.synthesis: You challenge each other's default mode — which is either exactly what you needed or what you weren't ready for.

Leo-Sagittarius.synthesis: Together you are louder, brighter, and harder to ignore. Whether that's what you need is a different question.

Leo-Capricorn.synthesis: The heat is useful when the earth channels it. The earth is useful when the fire can wait long enough.

Leo-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Leo-Pisces.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Virgo-Virgo.synthesis: Neither of you wastes anything. The question is whether you're saving the relationship or just managing it.

Virgo-Libra.synthesis: You each think the other is slightly impractical, and you're both right about each other, and wrong.

Virgo-Scorpio.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Virgo-Sagittarius.synthesis: There's something genuinely generative in the friction. Whether either of you can tolerate friction is the question.

Virgo-Capricorn.synthesis: Shared values make for comfort. They also make it easier to avoid the conversation you keep not having.

Virgo-Aquarius.synthesis: You complement each other in ways neither fully acknowledges. The acknowledgment is the missing piece.

Virgo-Pisces.synthesis: You move at similar speeds, value similar things. That similarity is either comfort or camouflage.

Libra-Libra.synthesis: The ideas between you breed more ideas. At some point one of them needs to become something real.

Libra-Scorpio.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Libra-Sagittarius.synthesis: You bring out ambition in each other. Whose ambition you're actually serving is a fair question.

Libra-Capricorn.synthesis: The ideas need grounding. The ground needs ideas. Neither of you finds this as obvious as it sounds.

Libra-Aquarius.synthesis: You make each other sharper. You also make each other better at avoiding the things words can't fix.

Libra-Pisces.synthesis: You each feel slightly alien to the other. That's either the draw or the obstacle. Often both.

Scorpio-Scorpio.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Scorpio-Sagittarius.synthesis: The attraction was always obvious. The sustainability is the question neither of you has fully answered.

Scorpio-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you protects, one of you nourishes. At some point both of you need to be taken care of.

Scorpio-Aquarius.synthesis: You reach each other through completely different routes. The meeting place is interesting and unstable.

Scorpio-Pisces.synthesis: You both know how to hold pain without speaking. Decide if that's strength or evasion.

Sagittarius-Sagittarius.synthesis: There is enough heat between you to forge something remarkable or burn it all down. Usually both.

Sagittarius-Capricorn.synthesis: One of you wants to move before it's ready. One of you wants to wait until it's certain. Neither will be satisfied.

Sagittarius-Aquarius.synthesis: Unique compound formed. Properties unpredictable — explore with caution.

Sagittarius-Pisces.synthesis: One of you runs toward; one guards the door. The dance is interesting until someone gets tired.

Capricorn-Capricorn.synthesis: You anchor each other well. Make sure neither of you has quietly agreed to stop moving entirely.

Capricorn-Aquarius.synthesis: What you bring each other is exactly what the other struggles to generate alone. This should be easy. It isn't.

Capricorn-Pisces.synthesis: You care for each other in ways that are practical and non-intrusive. Neither says much. Both notice everything.

Aquarius-Aquarius.synthesis: You understand each other at a speed that feels like recognition. Familiarity this fast always hides something.

Aquarius-Pisces.synthesis: You're both drawn to what the other has access to. Whether you can access it in each other is the question.

Pisces-Pisces.synthesis: You absorb each other's moods completely. Make sure the current is flowing in a direction you chose.

calculation_methods: Planetary longitudes: Jean Meeus 'Astronomical Algorithms' low-precision formulae (±1° accuracy)
Retrograde: computed from direction of longitude change vs previous day
Aspects: angular separation with standard orbs (conjunction 8°, sextile 6°, square/trine/opposition 8°, quincunx 3°)
Compatibility: element harmony base score + modality adjustment + date-seeded variance
Daily readings: deterministic date-seed (PRNG) selects from 60-entry per-sign pools + 30-entry suffix pool; 1,800 combinations per sign
